steps.title: Substitute the given number of small boxes
steps.content: Replace a with 3 in the equation $$3a + 4b = 25$$: $$3(3) + 4b = 25$$ which simplifies to $$9 + 4b = 25$$.

steps.title: Solve for the number of large boxes
steps.content:
Subtract 9 from both sides: $$4b = 16$$.
Divide both sides by 4: $$b = 4$$.
That is the correct answer.
